subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the Divine Countenance! We have heard thy clamour and thy cry, and thy confession of sins. Verily thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتوجه الی الوجه قد سمعنا ضجیجک و صریخک و اعترافک بخطیئاتک ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
